user.title: Smart Heatpump Controller
user.description: Set up your power sensor and weather entity. You can add a thermostat and other settings later via Configure.

data_description.p1_net_power_entity: Smart meter sensor in Watts. Positive = importing, negative = exporting solar.
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity providing outdoor temperature and forecast. Met.no (weather.home) works out of the box.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Check that it exists in Developer Tools → States.

abort.already_configured: Smart Heatpump Controller is already configured.

data_description.thermostat_entity: The climate entity that controls your heat pump. Leave empty for dry run mode.
data_description.temp_sensor_entity: Standalone temperature sensor. If empty, the thermostat's built-in reading is used.
data_description.p1_net_power_entity: Smart meter sensor in Watts. Positive = importing, negative = exporting solar.
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity providing outdoor temperature and forecast.
data_description.forecast_solar_entity: Paste the entity ID of your Forecast.Solar 'next hour' sensor (e.g. sensor.energy_next_hour). Leave empty if not installed.
data_description.notify_targets: Comma-separated notify service names without the 'notify.' prefix. Example: mobile_app_my_phone, telegram

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Check that it exists in Developer Tools → States.
